title: ajuga × mixta
intro: Ajuga × mixta, also known as Bugle or Bugleweed, is a hybrid plant species obtained from the cross-breeding of Ajuga reptans and Ajuga genevensis. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the synthesis of thyroid hormones, making it a potential treatment for hyperthyroidism. The health benefits of Bugleweed include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Bugleweed is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
